name: Veal Valdostana
recipeIngredient: 4 Veal cutlets (4 oz each), preferably from leg
recipeInstructions:
Garnish: 8 lemon wedges
1. Spread bread crumbs on a sheet of wax paper or a paper plate; set aside.
2. In a bowl combine flour, salt, and pepper; dredge cutlets in flour, coating all sides.
3. Dip each cutlet into beaten egg, then into bread crumbs, thoroughly coating all sides.
4. In a 12-inch nonstick skillet heat margarine over medium heat until hot and bubbly; add cutlets and brown on both sides.
5. Transfer cutlets to a jelly-roll pan or cookie sheet; top each with 1 ounce cheese.
6. Broil just until cheese melts.
7. Serve each portion garnished with 2 lemon wedges.
Makes 4 servings.
